instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect shift timeout conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect shift fault when Shift_Duration exceeds Shift_Timeout_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Duration > Shift_Timeout_Threshold THEN Shift_Timeout_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall retry gear shift when timeout occurs.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall attempt shift retry when Shift_Timeout_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall inhibit further shifting after repeated shift timeouts.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shifting when Shift_Timeout_Count exceeds Timeout_Limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor gear engagement timing.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall measure time between shift command and gear engagement.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Timer > Shift_Timeout_Threshold THEN Shift_Timeout_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect incomplete shifts.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Gear_Position does not change after shift command.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Command_Issued = TRUE AND Gear_Position = Previous_Gear THEN Shift_Timeout_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect slow gear engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Gear_Engagement_Time exceeds Engagement_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Engagement_Time > Engagement_Limit THEN Shift_Timeout_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate timeout faults from other shift faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall classify shift faults when timeout condition occurs.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Timeout_Fault = TRUE THEN Fault_Type = Timeout

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear when shift timeout occurs.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when Shift_Timeout_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear shift timeout faults after successful shift.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear timeout fault when gear engagement occurs successfully.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect actuator delays during shifting.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when actuator response time exceeds Response_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Actuator_Response_Time > Response_Limit THEN Shift_Timeout_Fault = TRUE
